'''鈭歠-th-g-th''' ('''kafathgethoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:turd|turd]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-th-g-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:turd|turd]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歠-th-g-th
|-
! Lemma
| kafathgethoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifathgethoko|thifathgethoko]] || [[word:jifathgethoko|jifathgethoko]] || [[word:shifathgethoko|shifathgethoko]] || [[word:kifathgethoko|kifathgethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufathgethoko|thuthufathgethoko]] || [[word:jujufathgethoko|jujufathgethoko]] || [[word:shushufathgethoko|shushufathgethoko]] || [[word:kukufathgethoko|kukufathgethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufathgethoko|thufathgethoko]] || [[word:jufathgethoko|jufathgethoko]] || [[word:shufathgethoko|shufathgethoko]] || [[word:kufathgethoko|kufathgethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thufathgethoko|thufathgethoko]] || [[word:jufathgethoko|jufathgethoko]] || [[word:shufathgethoko|shufathgethoko]] || [[word:kufathgethoko|kufathgethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thefathgethoko|thefathgethoko]] || [[word:jefathgethoko|jefathgethoko]] || [[word:shefathgethoko|shefathgethoko]] || [[word:kefathgethoko|kefathgethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothofathgethoko|thothofathgethoko]] || [[word:jojofathgethoko|jojofathgethoko]] || [[word:shoshofathgethoko|shoshofathgethoko]] || [[word:kokofathgethoko|kokofathgethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofathgethoko|thofathgethoko]] || [[word:jofathgethoko|jofathgethoko]] || [[word:shofathgethoko|shofathgethoko]] || [[word:kofathgethoko|kofathgethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofathgethoko|thofathgethoko]] || [[word:jofathgethoko|jofathgethoko]] || [[word:shofathgethoko|shofathgethoko]] || [[word:kofathgethoko|kofathgethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙fathgethoko|th忙fathgethoko]] || [[word:j忙fathgethoko|j忙fathgethoko]] || [[word:sh忙fathgethoko|sh忙fathgethoko]] || [[word:k忙fathgethoko|k忙fathgethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafathgethoko|thathafathgethoko]] || [[word:jajafathgethoko|jajafathgethoko]] || [[word:shashafathgethoko|shashafathgethoko]] || [[word:kakafathgethoko|kakafathgethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafathgethoko|thafathgethoko]] || [[word:jafathgethoko|jafathgethoko]] || [[word:shafathgethoko|shafathgethoko]] || [[word:kafathgethoko|kafathgethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafathgethoko|thafathgethoko]] || [[word:jafathgethoko|jafathgethoko]] || [[word:shafathgethoko|shafathgethoko]] || [[word:kafathgethoko|kafathgethoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shafathgethithi|shafathgethithi]] || [[word:shafathgethiji|shafathgethiji]] || [[word:shafathgethishi|shafathgethishi]] || [[word:shafathgethiki|shafathgethiki]]

|-
